title: Docker compatibility mode broken in rootless mode
body:
### Issue Description

When starting the httpd image from Podman Desktop on a rootless machine, we had a strange error message:

`Error: (HTTP code 500) server error - crun: write to `/proc/self/oom_score_adj`: Permission denied: OCI permission denied`

When run through:

`podman run -d -p 9000:80 --name httpd httpd
`
the container is started

If the machine is run with Docker compatibility mode, the command:

`docker run -d --p 9001:80 --name httpd1 httpd`

returns the same error message

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a rootless podman machine
2. podman run -d -p 9000:80 --name httpd httpd
3. docker run -d --p 9001:80 --name httpd1 httpd


### Describe the results you received

Container does not start when run from the Docker CLI or Podman Desktop

### Describe the results you expected

Container should be started when run from the Docker CLI or Podman Desktop

### Additional information
